message.content: Begin autonomous session. STEP 0: rebuild context from prior session log + lessons. STEP 1: orientation via feature_list.json. STEP 2: pick next pending F-NN or R-NN item. STEP 3: execute. STEP 4: verify triad. STEP 5: commit code. STEP 6: write lesson to .autonomous/lessons/. STEP 7: mark feature_list passes:true. STEP 8: commit lesson. Then exit cleanly. Reverse-engineering queue R-013 (I Ching 64), R-014 (Human Design), R-015 (Gene Keys), R-016 (Enneagrama) is open and aligned with the 5-Pilares project goal. Use autonomous tools fully. Do not invent esoteric correspondences — derive from canonical sources (R-022, R-022b, VISION.md).
